name: Reference
description: This is a reference for the objects below, not a variant. Each field is an example or description of its content.
location: The line range where the component is located (e.g. #L10-L20 means the component is between line 10 and 20). The range may not be exact, so leave a margin of error.

name: Flat
description: Alert component with solid styling without border, glow, or heavy depth.

name: Light
description: Alert component with soft low-contrast styling for subtle status messaging.

name: With border
description: Alert component with outlined container with a visible stroke around the message.

name: Left accent
description: Alert component with a vertical accent stripe on the left edge for status emphasis.

name: With dismiss button
description: Alert component with an inline close action so users can hide the message.

name: Neobrutalism
description: Alert component with high-contrast neobrutalist styling with hard edges and bold outlines.
